title: Review: Widow's Bay is a boldly original take on comedic horror
gist: Apple TV's new comedic-horror series Widow's Bay, created by Parks and Recreation writer Katie Dippold, drew strong critical praise and word-of-mouth growth (viewership tripled by episode four), with a second season already greenlit.

insights.claim: Apple TV's comedic-horror series Widow's Bay saw viewership triple from launch by its fourth episode driven by positive word of mouth, and has already been greenlit for a second season.
insights.speaker: Jennifer Ouellette
insights.so_what: A breakout original hit supports Apple TV's content-driven streaming positioning; audience growth signals subscriber-retention value.
insights.quote: By the time the Patricia-centric fourth episode ("Beach Reads") aired, viewership numbers had tripled since the launch
